title: artrolobium scorpioides
intro: Artrolobium scorpioides, also known as the "scorpion's tail," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. Artrolobium scorpioides is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
